channel.title: Games on Aaditya Maheshwari
channel.description: Recent content in Games on Aaditya Maheshwari

item.title: Games I play regularly
item.description: Following are some games (PC) that I play often & never get bored: Counter Strike: Global Offensive (CS:GO) -> First-person shooter (FPS) genre FIFA -> Sport genre Fortnite Battle Royale -> Battle Royale genre Overwatch -> FPS genre I never get bored playing these games. They don’t have a fixed storyline or a campaign that repeats over & over again. All these games have great support from the companies & the community.
